name: Delta Force

"Delta Force" season update latest official announcement

seasons.description: The current Delta Force season adds the Morphosis content update with a new Operator, seasonal events and rewards, fresh store content, and balance changes across the game's modes.
Season Ahsarah introduced a new Operator, a new map, new mini-mode content, seasonal events, and large cross-mode improvements before ending in late January 2026.
Season War Ablaze launched as the game's first anniversary season with a new seasonal reward track, new content, and a broad live-service refresh across events and progression.
Season Break brought a new seasonal update with reward events, progression incentives, and refreshed store offerings as part of Delta Force's ongoing live-service cadence.
Eclipse Vigil launched with Delta Force's global official launch and introduced the first major season content package for the worldwide release.
